title: Luffy Stands Up to Arlong
description: On pages 9–12, luffy stands up to arlong focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.
scene: On pages 9–12, luffy stands up to arlong focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The hell? You're just swinging around those swords randomly...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't have the time to play around with you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: enough with your stupid little g...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Of course I don't know how to fight with swords, you dumbass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What...? What's he trying to say...?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
